meta.title: Commercial Role
meta.topic: Who Commercials are, their regions, and what they can create and see.

questions.text: Which country are you answering for?
questions.help: So we can compare answers across countries. If you cover more than one, pick 'Head office / multiple' and add detail in the note.

questions.text: In real life, who decides that someone becomes a Commercial for a country and puts them in charge of it?
questions.help: How it actually happens — if it's someone else, name them in the note box.

questions.text: And in the app, who should be able to set that up — the same person, or someone else?
questions.help: If someone else, say who in the note box.

questions.text: Who decides which areas within a country a Commercial looks after?
questions.help: Whoever knows the country's areas well enough to make that call. If it's someone else, name them in the note box.
options: The Commercial suggests it and a manager approves

questions.text: And in the app, who should control that — the same person, or someone else?
questions.help: If someone else, say who in the note box.

questions.text: Does a Commercial usually look after specific areas of a country, or can one Commercial cover a whole country on their own?
questions.help: e.g. in Australia a Commercial covers QLD plus parts of NSW; other countries may not split into areas at all.

questions.text: When you describe the area a Commercial covers, what do you use? Tick every level you use.
questions.help: e.g. 'QLD' is a state; 'parts of NSW' might be shires/council areas.

questions.text: Can two Commercials share the same area, or is each area looked after by just one?
options: Each area has just one Commercial
An area can be shared by more than one

questions.text: Does a Commercial only deal with farms in their own areas, or can they work with farms anywhere in their country?
options: Only farms in their own areas

questions.text: Which farms does a Commercial need to know about (see the details of)?
questions.help: Even farms they don't personally manage.
options: Only farms in their own areas

questions.text: When a Commercial sets up a farm, whose is it to manage over time?
options: Only the Commercial who set it up
